Description: This premium matte lipstick provides vibrant color that lasts all day. Enriched with natural ingredients for smooth application.
Key benefits:
Long-lasting wear
Vibrant colors
Smooth application
Moisturizing formula
Ingredients: Beeswax, Shea Butter, Vitamin E, Natural Oils
How to Use: Apply directly to clean, dry lips. Start from the center and move outward.
Caution: For external use only. Discontinue if irritation occurs.

Description: Our hydrating face cream is formulated with natural ingredients to deeply moisturize and nourish your skin. Perfect for daily use.
Key benefits:
Deep hydration
Natural ingredients
Non-greasy formula
Suitable for all skin types
Ingredients: Hyaluronic Acid, Aloe Vera, Vitamin C, Glycerin
How to Use: Apply a small amount to clean face and neck. Massage gently in circular motions.
Caution: Avoid contact with eyes. Store in a cool, dry place.
